candidate.objective: Highly experienced and versatile tradesperson with a background spanning over 10 years as an IMCA-approved commercial diver across oil and gas, civil, marine, defence, mining, and railway sectors globally. Transitioned into the resources sector in Western Australia as a qualified Poly Welder with competencies in HDPE butt welding and electrofusion. Broad experience across tailings, dewatering, pipeline installation, and fabrication. BHP inducted. Holds an extensive suite of safety, first aid, offshore survival, and plant operation certifications.

employment.employer: Silverstone Energy — Wiluna Gold TSF Lift
duties: HDPE polywelding for tailings storage facility lift works at Wiluna Gold.

employment.employer: Silverstone Energy — Wiluna Gold Bore Fields Pipeline
duties: HDPE pipeline installation across a 15 km bore fields pipeline project.
HDPE polywelding as part of a team of three on a 10 km, 400 mm process water pipeline.
Pipeline installation to project specifications and quality standards.
HDPE fabrication and welding using Dixon and Technodue machines.
CPVC welding for chemical and process pipework.
General labouring in support of civil and process installation works.
Tailings management and dewatering operations at the Ravensthorpe nickel mine.
Day services and tailings management at Sunrise Dam gold mine.
Trade assistance to pipefitters and boilermakers across BHP shutdown projects.
Underground nipper duties supporting mining crews at BHP Cliffs.
Railway construction and civil works in support of infrastructure projects.

employment.employer: Subsea7 / Serimax / CRC Evans — Turkstream 2 Gas Project
duties: Pipeline operations on the Turkstream 2 offshore gas pipeline project.
IMCA-approved commercial diving across oil and gas, civil, marine, defence, mining, and railway sectors.

skills.detail: HDPE butt welding (PMBWELD301E) and electrofusion (PMBWELD302E); Dixon, Technodue machines; CPVC welding.
IMCA-approved commercial diver with 10 years offshore and subsea experience across oil and gas, civil, marine, and defence sectors globally.
HDPE and steel pipeline installation, gas line pipelaying, and subsea pipeline operations.
Integrated Tool Carrier (RIIHAN311F) and Front End Loader (RIIMPO321F).
Confined Spaces, Working at Heights, Gas Testing, STCW offshore survival, fire fighting, FOET/MIST, First Aid.

certifications.details: Enter and work in confined spaces.
Polyethylene welding qualification issued in the United Kingdom.
Licence to operate integrated tool carrier.
Licence to operate front end loader.
Provide first aid, CPR, and advanced first aid.
Royal Yachting Association Powerboat Level 2 certification.
Standards of Training, Certification and Watchkeeping — personal survival, fire fighting, first aid, and security awareness.
Further Offshore Emergency Training and Minimum Industry Safety Training for offshore operations.

referees: Professional references available upon request. Please contact ACM Resources to facilitate introduction.
